# Arabinda Saha | Data Systems Consultant

> I turn complex institutional work into clear, usable systems.

Arabinda Saha builds data systems, school program infrastructure, assessment tools, and governance workflows across education and legal operations.

## Focus Areas
- **Data and workflows**: Shape dashboards, governance structures, and operational flows so teams can see what matters and act on it.
- **Programs at scale**: Design school initiatives that can move across classrooms, coordinators, and institutions without losing quality.
- **Assessment systems**: Build evaluation structures students and schools can understand and use.

## Experience
- **Data Consultant @ Lakshmikumaran & Sridharan** (Feb 2026 – Present): Contributing to internal dashboards, governance structures, and operational workflows. Working on DPDPA-related compliance and systems questions.
- **Program Head – School Programs @ Edudigm** (Dec 2023 – Jan 2026): Led delivery across 5+ schools, reaching 1,500+ students and 60+ teachers. Built and scaled the Stellar Space Quiz to 600+ schools across 6 states.
- **Subject Matter Expert – Mathematics @ Edudigm** (Jun 2022 – Nov 2023): Designed structured assessments, revision systems, and student-facing academic material for Classes 9-12.

## Selected Projects
- **Career Assessment Tool**: Designed a career assessment initiative for students in Classes 9-12 within a broader school program. Piloted with ~500 students in a Kendriya Vidyalaya.
- **Stellar Space Quiz**: Scaled quiz to 600+ schools across 6 states with finals hosted at IIT Kharagpur Research Park in 2025.
- **School Programs and STEM Camps**: Delivered hands-on demonstrations to teach maths and science concepts.
